spotlight.title: Monthly Gyarwee Shareef
spotlight.description: Monthly Gyarwee Shareef gathering with Ethaale Thawaab for the parents of Haji Manzoor Hussain Qadari and brothers. Urdu speech by Khalifah Al Hajj Muhammad Sharif Naqshbandi sahib.
spotlight.location: Greenwich Madina Trust Ghousia Masjid, 56 Camrose Street, Plumstead, SE2 0JA

notificationBar.linkText: Monthly Gyarwee Shareef — Sunday 14th June, from 6:30pm
